documentation_impact.rationale: Phase 4 dogfood feature-delivery intake stage. The intake-analyst persona ran the canonicalize-spec dialogue against inbox/in/timestamp_naming_conventions.md and emitted a partial Engineering Spec, the feature index, a paired round-1 clarifying-question thread, and a work-folder intake handoff. The dialogue stops at round 1 awaiting human ratification per BOOTSTRAP §4 (max 5 rounds) and the feature-delivery human_approval gate. No directive or prior inbox artifact was renamed; the new naming convention is the deliverable, not a precondition.

deferred_items.rationale: Subsequent dialogue rounds depend on the operator's round-1 answers; the canonicalize-spec skill caps the dialogue at five rounds total and prohibits synthesizing the operator's responses.
feature-delivery plan stage cannot start until the spec passes the intake human_approval gate; tech-lead, coder, reviewer, tech-writer, supervisor, and librarian dispatches are deferred.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Slice delegates the intake stage to the named intake-analyst persona per §4 and stops cleanly at the human_approval gate per the working agreement.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Slice keeps every emitted artifact dual-anchored (with TBD-on-commit hashes for the parent to refresh) and preserves inbox lifecycle semantic-immutability rules.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Slice initiates the dogfood-us1 todo's first stage (canonicalization dialogue against a real semi-formal directive) without expanding scope past the intake artifact set.
